import json, re, unicodedata, math
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

# Load files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:10]

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)
len(hadith), hadith[0].keys()

import re
import unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics pattern
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # unify forms
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ؤ", "و")
    s = s.replace("ٰ", "")  # dagger alif
    s = s.replace("ٱ", "ا")
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # remove punctuation/ellipses
    s = re.sub(r"[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]", " ", s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip().lower()
    return s

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = set(normalize_arabic(a).split())
    tb = set(normalize_arabic(b).split())
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(ta & tb)
    prec = inter / len(ta)
    rec = inter / len(tb)
    if prec+rec == 0: return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

def lcs_ratio(a,b):
    # normalized
    na, nb = normalize_arabic(a), normalize_arabic(b)
    # sequence matcher ratio approximates closeness; but we can use longest common subsequence length / max(len(a), len(b))
    # Use difflib ratio as approx
    return SequenceMatcher(None, na, nb).ratio()

def ngram_overlap(a,b, n=3):
    na, nb = normalize_arabic(a), normalize_arabic(b)
    def ngrams(s, n):
        tokens = s.split()
        if len(tokens)<n: return set([" ".join(tokens)])
        return set(" ".join(tokens[i:i+n]) for i in range(len(tokens)-n+1))
    A = ngrams(na, n)
    B = ngrams(nb, n)
    if not A or not B:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(A & B)
    union = len(A | B)
    return inter / union

FULL = "إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ يَا إِبْلِيسُ مَنْ أَسْبَغْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُوءَ الْعَمَلِ فَإِنَّكَ لَمَسْبُغٌ لَهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَعَبِيدُكَ"
print(normalize_arabic(FULL))

# Find top candidate ayahs by similarity to FULL
scores = []
for v in quran:
    text = v['ayah_text']
    f1 = token_f1(FULL, text)
    lcs = lcs_ratio(FULL, text)
    n3 = ngram_overlap(FULL, text, n=2)
    combo = 0.5*lcs + 0.5*f1  # simple combo
    scores.append((combo, f1, lcs, n3, v))

scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
scores_sorted[:10]

# Search hadith DB for approximate matches
def best_hadith_matches(full, topn=5):
    scores = []
    for h in hadith:
        txt = h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ""
        if not txt:
            continue
        f1 = token_f1(full, txt)
        lcs = lcs_ratio(full, txt)
        combo = 0.5*(f1 + lcs)
        if combo > 0.4:  # filter to reduce outputs
            scores.append((combo, f1, lcs, txt[:120], h['BookID'], h['hadithID']))
    return sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:topn]

best_hadith_matches(FULL, topn=10)

candidates = [
    (15,32),
    (7,12),
    (38,75),
    (15,28),
    (38,71),
    (15,33),
    (15,31)
]
for s,a in candidates:
    matches = [v for v in quran if v['surah_id']==s and v['ayah_id']==a]
    if matches:
        text = matches[0]['ayah_text']
        print(s,a,text)
        print("F1:", token_f1(FULL, text), "LCS:", lcs_ratio(FULL, text))
